title: Add Tooltip to Group By Feature Toggle Icon
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a tooltip on the Group By icon explaining its function and that multi-select is disabled when grouping is active, so that I understand the feature behavior.
description: Adds a styled tooltip to the Group By toggle icon reading: "Group by and browse by category. Multi-select is disabled when the group by feature is enabled." This provides inline guidance for users who may not be familiar with the grouping feature's impact on row selection.
acceptance_criteria: Tooltip appears on hover over the Group By icon
Tooltip text reads the specified message about multi-select being disabled
Tooltip styling matches the existing info icon tooltip pattern
ux_changes: Added a styled tooltip to the Group By toggle icon explaining the feature and its impact on multi-select.
implementation_notes: Initial implementation placed the tooltip on the wrong icon. Ryan clarified it should be on the Group By toggle icon specifically.
comment_summary: Ryan found the tooltip was on the wrong icon and returned to working. Balaji corrected the placement.
